## Bowties Prior-Work Discovery (do this as part of initial research)

Before beginning the analysis, scan `specs/ideas/**` (all bucket subfolders: `features/`, `refactors/`, `docs/`, `process/`) for idea files with area tags matching this feature. Surface any relevant prior analysis, deferred decisions, or superseded approaches so the analysis accounts for prior work and avoids recommending already-rejected approaches.
